mapper.insert:
insert into article_categories
article_categories_id, name, slug, description, sort, article_count, create_time, is_deleted,
#{articleCategoriesId}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{sort}, 0, now(), 0,
mapper.update:
update article_categories
name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = now()
where article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId} and is_deleted = 0
update article_categories set article_count = article_count + 1 where article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId} and is_deleted = 0
update article_categories set article_count = article_count - 1 where article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select article_categories_id, name, slug, description, sort, article_count from article_categories where is_deleted = 0
select article_categories_id, name, slug, description, sort from article_categories where article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId} and is_deleted = 0
select article_count from article_categories where article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId} and is_deleted = 0

select articles_id, article_categories_id, category_name, title, slug, summary, cover_image, view_count, like_count, comment_count, word_count, reading_time, is_top, publish_time from articles where is_published = 1 and article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId} and is_deleted = 0
